tracks.meaning: the bottom surface of a room or building on which people walk
the bottom surface of the foot or paw of an animal
a story or level of a building, or the ground level itself
to knock someone down or cause them to fall to the ground
the right to speak next in a parliamentary or legislative session
the minimum acceptable price or terms that a seller will accept
the space or area allocated to display goods in a retail environment
to confuse or perplex someone completely, rendering them unable to respond
a continuous instrumental backing track or rhythm section supporting vocalists or soloists
the lowest-level or foundational layer of a system or network architecture
